summary: Frontend-only test of Dedari Store Bali landing page. All 24 critical checks passed including app load, header/nav, hero, calculator (success + rejection), buyer catalog (8 items + filters + terjual overlay), FAQ accordion, floating WA button, footer, and mobile responsive menu. Zero console errors observed.
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: BuyerPath.jsx HARGA_RANGES filter logic uses `u.harga < r.min` and `u.harga >= r.max` — the boundary '5-8 juta' bucket includes 5M but excludes 8M (acceptable contiguous behaviour). Document if intentional.

Minor: pricing.js — Math.round((titipJual * (1 - potonganJualPutus)) / 50000) * 50000 rounds to nearest 50k. iPhone 13 128GB Grade A computed 5,850,000 (titip) and 5,450,000 (putus). Confirmed correct per config.
Minor: Calculator field state — when user changes 'model', kapasitas resets but bh/kondisi/riwayat/kelengkapan persist. Acceptable but consider clarifying UX.
Minor: Product card terjual uses href='#' with onClick preventDefault — works but href='javascript:void(0)' or absent href on disabled state would be cleaner.
Good: All required data-testid attributes are present and working; no hardcoded URLs; uses REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL pattern via .env.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Single-page landing for Dedari Store Bali (iPhone reseller in Bali). Frontend-only React + Tailwind app, no backend APIs. All data in config.json (WA number 6281237529881, 8 catalog items, pricing tiers). Public URL: https://beli-jual-iphone.preview.emergentagent.com. Tested viewports: 1920x1080 desktop + 375x844 mobile. All flows worked first time without code changes.

test_evidence.catalog_count: 8 unit ditampilkan (default), 4 unit ditampilkan after Grade A filter
test_evidence.product_6_state: Button text 'Sudah Terjual' with cursor-not-allowed class and Terjual overlay
test_evidence.nav_links_smooth_scroll: All 4 nav links (penjual/pembeli/cara-kerja/faq) scroll target into viewport
test_evidence.mobile_menu: Toggle button visible at 375px, opens mobile-nav-penjual etc.
